title: scrophularia jinii
intro: Scrophularia jinii, also known as Huang Jing, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Scrophularia jinii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Scrophularia jinii can be prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a powder or extract.
